facts.place: Richmond, Cache, Utah Territory, United States

facts.value:
Son of John Richardson and Lola Ann Amelia Tyler

Married Florence Speak, 14 Aug 1901, Ogden, Weber, Utah

Obituary - Thomas H. Richardson ~ SMITHFIELD, Cache County- Funeral services for Thomas Henry Richardson, 75, who died at his home Tuesday afternoon after a lingering illness, will be conducted Friday at 2 p.m. in Smithfield Third, ward Chapel, Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, by R. H. Toolson, bishop.

Friends may call at the Third Ward Relief Society room Friday from 10am to time of services.

Burial will be in Richmond cemetery under Direction of Kenneth Lindquist Mortuary.

He married Florence Speak at Ogden in 1901 and had been a Smithfield resident 49 years. He was employed at Smithfield Brick Company 25 years and for Keith Meikle eight years.

Surviving are his widow: a son and three daughters, John Ed Richardson and Mrs. Grace Peterson, Smithfield; Mrs. Lola Coley. Lewiston: Mrs. May Larson. Ogden; 15 grandchildren and four great-grandchildren. - Source: The Salt Lake Tribune, Salt Lake City, UT, Thursday, 26 Apr 1951, Pg. 53
